requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（INNOQ / NM-IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（INNOQ / NM-IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires entering the Mozambique market are expected to meet electrical-safety requirements based on IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), adopted through INNOQ as an NM (Norma Mocambicana) standard; self-ballasted LED lamps additionally follow IEC 62560. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock (touch current, insulation resistance, creepage and clearance distances), thermal protection, mechanical strength, and wiring terminals. Conformity is demonstrated within INNOQ conformity / import inspection for regulated electrical products; an IECEE CB Scheme test report to IEC 60598-1 (with any national differences) is the practical international bridge because Mozambique adopts IEC standards. Mozambique uses a 220 V / 50 Hz supply; the 50 Hz frequency matches China, and the 220 V single-phase nominal is similar to China's single-phase, but products rated only for China's three-phase 380 V must be checked against the 220 V single-phase nominal. Portuguese-language safety markings and instructions are required, and an in-country importer of record handles customs clearance.
summary.zh: 进入莫桑比克市场的 LED 灯具应满足基于 IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）的电气安全要求，经 INNOQ 以 NM（莫桑比克标准）形式采纳；自镇流 LED 灯另遵循 IEC 62560。核心要求涵盖防触电（接触电流、绝缘电阻、爬电距离和电气间隙）、热保护、机械强度及接线端子。合规在受管制电气产品的 INNOQ 合规/进口检验内证明；因莫桑比克采纳 IEC 标准，符合 IEC 60598-1（含任何国家差异）的 IECEE CB 体系检测报告是实际国际桥梁。莫桑比克采用 220 V / 50 Hz 供电；50 Hz 频率与中国一致，220 V 单相额定值与中国单相相似，但仅按中国三相 380 V 额定的产品须对照 220 V 单相额定值核查。须有葡萄牙语安全标识和说明书，并由在地进口记录商处理清关。
summary.zht: 進入莫三比克市場的 LED 燈具應滿足基於 IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）的電氣安全要求，經 INNOQ 以 NM（莫三比克標準）形式採納；自鎮流 LED 燈另遵循 IEC 62560。核心要求涵蓋防觸電（接觸電流、絕緣電阻、爬電距離和電氣間隙）、熱保護、機械強度及接線端子。合規在受管制電氣產品的 INNOQ 合規/進口檢驗內證明；因莫三比克採納 IEC 標準，符合 IEC 60598-1（含任何國家差異）的 IECEE CB 體系檢測報告是實際國際橋樑。莫三比克採用 220 V / 50 Hz 供電；50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，220 V 單相額定值與中國單相相似，但僅按中國三相 380 V 額定的產品須對照 220 V 單相額定值核查。須有葡萄牙語安全標識和說明書，並由在地進口記錄商處理清關。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (adopted via NM/IEC by INNOQ)
IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Safety specifications (adopted via NM/IEC)
INNOQ conformity / import inspection for regulated electrical products; IECEE CB test report as practical bridge

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026 and changing the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T; CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules rather than the GB/T designation alone. Self-ballasted LED lamp safety in China is covered by GB 24906 / GB 16915-family rules where applicable. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorised laboratories. Both GB 7000.1 and the Mozambique NM/IEC basis derive from IEC 60598-1, so the underlying safety content is largely shared, but CCC/GB documentation is in Chinese and is not automatically recognised for Mozambique INNOQ conformity.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，并将属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T；范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。中国自镇流 LED 灯安全在适用时由 GB 24906 / GB 16915 系列规则涵盖。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。GB 7000.1 与莫桑比克 NM/IEC 基础均源自 IEC 60598-1，因此底层安全内容基本共通，但 CCC/GB 文件为中文且不自动获莫桑比克 INNOQ 合规认可。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，並將屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T；範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。中國自鎮流 LED 燈安全在適用時由 GB 24906 / GB 16915 系列規則涵蓋。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。GB 7000.1 與莫三比克 NM/IEC 基礎均源自 IEC 60598-1，因此底層安全內容基本共通，但 CCC/GB 文件為中文且不自動獲莫三比克 INNOQ 合規認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both GB 7000.1 and the Mozambique NM/IEC basis derive from IEC 60598-1, so the technical safety content is largely shared and re-testing burden is moderate rather than fundamental. Key Mozambique-specific points: (1) the recognised technical bridge is IEC — an IECEE CB report to IEC 60598-1 (and IEC 62560 for lamps) is far more useful to INNOQ than a CCC certificate, which is not automatically recognised; (2) safety markings, ratings, and instructions must be in Portuguese; (3) supply is 220 V / 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China so frequency-dependent components need no change, and the 220 V single-phase nominal is similar to China's single-phase, but any product designed around China's three-phase 380 V supply must be re-checked for the 220 V single-phase Mozambique context; (4) creepage/clearance and some test conditions can differ between GB and IEC editions, so existing CN reports may need re-issuing in CB/IEC form; (5) an in-country importer of record is required to clear customs (Maputo/Beira/Nacala) and interface with INNOQ. Confirm whether the specific luminaire type falls within INNOQ's current regulated-product list and any pre-shipment-inspection requirement.
gap.zh: GB 7000.1 与莫桑比克 NM/IEC 基础均源自 IEC 60598-1，因此技术安全内容基本共通，重测负担为中等而非根本性。莫桑比克特有要点：（1）获认可的技术桥梁是 IEC——符合 IEC 60598-1（灯另含 IEC 62560）的 IECEE CB 报告对 INNOQ 远比不自动获认可的 CCC 证书有用；（2）安全标识、额定值及说明书须为葡萄牙语；（3）供电为 220 V / 50 Hz——50 Hz 频率与中国一致，故频率相关元件无需更改，220 V 单相额定值与中国单相相似，但任何围绕中国三相 380 V 供电设计的产品须就 220 V 单相莫桑比克环境重新核查；（4）GB 与 IEC 版本间爬电距离/电气间隙及部分试验条件可能不同，现有中国报告可能需以 CB/IEC 形式重新出具；（5）须有在地进口记录商清关（马普托/贝拉/纳卡拉）并对接 INNOQ。请确认具体灯具类型是否在 INNOQ 现行受管制产品清单内及任何装运前检验要求。
gap.zht: GB 7000.1 與莫三比克 NM/IEC 基礎均源自 IEC 60598-1，因此技術安全內容基本共通，重測負擔為中等而非根本性。莫三比克特有要點：（1）獲認可的技術橋樑是 IEC——符合 IEC 60598-1（燈另含 IEC 62560）的 IECEE CB 報告對 INNOQ 遠比不自動獲認可的 CCC 證書有用；（2）安全標識、額定值及說明書須為葡萄牙語；（3）供電為 220 V / 50 Hz——50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，故頻率相關元件無需更改，220 V 單相額定值與中國單相相似，但任何圍繞中國三相 380 V 供電設計的產品須就 220 V 單相莫三比克環境重新核查；（4）GB 與 IEC 版本間爬電距離/電氣間隙及部分試驗條件可能不同，現有中國報告可能需以 CB/IEC 形式重新出具；（5）須有在地進口記錄商清關（馬普托/貝拉/納卡拉）並對接 INNOQ。請確認具體燈具類型是否在 INNOQ 現行受管制產品清單內及任何裝運前檢驗要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (regulated products) — electrical safety to NM/IEC 60598-1 (and IEC 62560 for lamps) required within INNOQ conformity / import inspection; Portuguese-language markings and in-country importer required. IECEE CB report is the practical bridge. Confirm regulated-product scope with importer.
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety is the binding gate for Mozambique market access, demonstrated within INNOQ conformity against NM/IEC 60598-1 (and IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps). Because both China's GB 7000.1 and the Mozambique basis derive from IEC 60598-1, the safety content is largely shared, but CCC/GB evidence is not automatically recognised — an IECEE CB test report is the practical bridge. Supply is 220 V / 50 Hz: the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but China three-phase 380 V designs must be re-checked for the 220 V single-phase context. Portuguese-language markings/instructions and an in-country importer of record are required. Confirm regulated-product scope and any pre-shipment inspection with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电气安全是莫桑比克市场准入的约束性关口，在 INNOQ 合规内对照 NM/IEC 60598-1（自镇流灯另含 IEC 62560）证明。由于中国 GB 7000.1 与莫桑比克基础均源自 IEC 60598-1，安全内容基本共通，但 CCC/GB 证据不自动获认可——IECEE CB 检测报告是实际桥梁。供电为 220 V / 50 Hz：50 Hz 频率与中国一致，但中国三相 380 V 设计须就 220 V 单相环境重新核查。须有葡萄牙语标识/说明书及在地进口记录商。请与进口商确认受管制产品范围及任何装运前检验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電氣安全是莫三比克市場准入的約束性關口，在 INNOQ 合規內對照 NM/IEC 60598-1（自鎮流燈另含 IEC 62560）證明。由於中國 GB 7000.1 與莫三比克基礎均源自 IEC 60598-1，安全內容基本共通，但 CCC/GB 證據不自動獲認可——IECEE CB 檢測報告是實際橋樑。供電為 220 V / 50 Hz：50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，但中國三相 380 V 設計須就 220 V 單相環境重新核查。須有葡萄牙語標識/說明書及在地進口記錄商。請與進口商確認受管制產品範圍及任何裝運前檢驗。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Control Gear Safety (IEC 61347-2-13) for Mozambique
requirement_topic.zh: LED 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（IEC 61347-2-13）在莫桑比克
requirement_topic.zht: LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（IEC 61347-2-13）在莫三比克

summary.en: LED drivers (control gear for LED modules) for the Mozambique market are expected to meet safety requirements based on IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), adopted via INNOQ as an NM/IEC standard, together with the general control-gear requirements of IEC 61347-1. The standard specifies isolation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, and safety marking. Where the driver is sold as a separate product (not integrated into the luminaire), its own safety evidence is expected; where integrated, the driver evidence forms part of the luminaire safety file under IEC 60598-1. Conformity is demonstrated within INNOQ conformity / import inspection; an IECEE CB test report to IEC 61347-2-13 is the practical international bridge. The driver must be rated for the Mozambique 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply (50 Hz matches China; verify the input-voltage rating covers 220 V single-phase rather than only a China three-phase configuration). Portuguese-language markings apply.
summary.zh: 面向莫桑比克市场的 LED 驱动器（LED 模块控制装置）应满足基于 IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）的安全要求，经 INNOQ 以 NM/IEC 标准形式采纳，并配合 IEC 61347-1 的控制装置通用要求。该标准规定绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性及安全标志。当驱动器作为独立产品销售（未集成于灯具内）时，应具备其自身安全证据；当集成时，驱动器证据作为 IEC 60598-1 下灯具安全文件的一部分。合规在 INNOQ 合规/进口检验内证明；符合 IEC 61347-2-13 的 IECEE CB 检测报告是实际国际桥梁。驱动器须按莫桑比克 220 V / 50 Hz 单相供电额定（50 Hz 与中国一致；核实输入电压额定覆盖 220 V 单相而非仅中国三相配置）。适用葡萄牙语标识。
summary.zht: 面向莫三比克市場的 LED 驅動器（LED 模組控制裝置）應滿足基於 IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）的安全要求，經 INNOQ 以 NM/IEC 標準形式採納，並配合 IEC 61347-1 的控制裝置通用要求。該標準規定絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及安全標誌。當驅動器作為獨立產品銷售（未集成於燈具內）時，應具備其自身安全證據；當集成時，驅動器證據作為 IEC 60598-1 下燈具安全文件的一部分。合規在 INNOQ 合規/進口檢驗內證明；符合 IEC 61347-2-13 的 IECEE CB 檢測報告是實際國際橋樑。驅動器須按莫三比克 220 V / 50 Hz 單相供電額定（50 Hz 與中國一致；核實輸入電壓額定覆蓋 220 V 單相而非僅中國三相配置）。適用葡萄牙語標識。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (adopted via NM/IEC by INNOQ)
IEC 61347-1 — Lamp controlgear — Part 1: General and safety requirements
INNOQ conformity / import inspection; IECEE CB test report as practical bridge

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), technically aligned with IEC 61347-2-13, together with GB 19510.1 for the general requirements. CCC certification may be required for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. Chinese CCC test reports under GB 19510.14 are not automatically recognised for Mozambique INNOQ conformity, but the shared IEC 61347-2-13 base means the underlying evidence is largely reusable when re-issued in IECEE CB / IEC form.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求），技术上与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐，并配合 GB 19510.1 的通用要求。在中国居民市场，特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。中国 GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 检测报告不自动获莫桑比克 INNOQ 合规认可，但共同的 IEC 61347-2-13 基础意味着以 IECEE CB / IEC 形式重新出具时底层证据基本可复用。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求），技術上與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊，並配合 GB 19510.1 的通用要求。在中國居民市場，特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。中國 GB 19510.14 下的 CCC 檢測報告不自動獲莫三比克 INNOQ 合規認可，但共同的 IEC 61347-2-13 基礎意味著以 IECEE CB / IEC 形式重新出具時底層證據基本可復用。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR)
GB 19510.1 — Lamp controlgear — Part 1: General and safety requirements (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: EN/IEC and GB 19510.14 are both derived from IEC 61347-2-13, so the technical content is largely harmonised and the re-testing burden is low. Mozambique-specific points: (1) the recognised technical bridge is IEC — an IECEE CB report to IEC 61347-2-13 is more useful to INNOQ than a CCC certificate; (2) if the driver is sold standalone, its own safety evidence is needed; if integrated, it sits within the luminaire IEC 60598-1 file; (3) the driver must be rated for the Mozambique 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply — 50 Hz matches China, but confirm the input rating covers 220 V single-phase and is not configured only for a China three-phase 380 V context; (4) Portuguese-language markings apply; (5) Chinese CCC for drivers is power-range dependent, so a CN product may or may not already hold third-party test evidence — obtain a CB report covering the relevant power/voltage range. An in-country importer of record handles clearance. There is no Mozambique RoHS overlay on driver components (see ledmz-rohs).
gap.zh: EN/IEC 与 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，因此技术内容基本协调，重测负担低。莫桑比克特有要点：（1）获认可的技术桥梁是 IEC——符合 IEC 61347-2-13 的 IECEE CB 报告对 INNOQ 比 CCC 证书更有用；（2）若驱动器独立销售，须具备其自身安全证据；若集成，则置于灯具 IEC 60598-1 文件内；（3）驱动器须按莫桑比克 220 V / 50 Hz 单相供电额定——50 Hz 与中国一致，但须确认输入额定覆盖 220 V 单相，而非仅按中国三相 380 V 配置；（4）适用葡萄牙语标识；（5）中国 CCC 对驱动器视功率范围而定，因此中国产品可能已或未持有第三方检测证据——应取得涵盖相关功率/电压范围的 CB 报告。由在地进口记录商处理清关。莫桑比克对驱动器元件无 RoHS 叠加要求（见 ledmz-rohs）。
gap.zht: EN/IEC 與 GB 19510.14 均源自 IEC 61347-2-13，因此技術內容基本協調，重測負擔低。莫三比克特有要點：（1）獲認可的技術橋樑是 IEC——符合 IEC 61347-2-13 的 IECEE CB 報告對 INNOQ 比 CCC 證書更有用；（2）若驅動器獨立銷售，須具備其自身安全證據；若集成，則置於燈具 IEC 60598-1 文件內；（3）驅動器須按莫三比克 220 V / 50 Hz 單相供電額定——50 Hz 與中國一致，但須確認輸入額定覆蓋 220 V 單相，而非僅按中國三相 380 V 配置；（4）適用葡萄牙語標識；（5）中國 CCC 對驅動器視功率範圍而定，因此中國產品可能已或未持有第三方檢測證據——應取得涵蓋相關功率/電壓範圍的 CB 報告。由在地進口記錄商處理清關。莫三比克對驅動器元件無 RoHS 疊加要求（見 ledmz-rohs）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — LED driver safety to IEC 61347-2-13 expected within INNOQ conformity; standalone drivers need own safety evidence, integrated drivers sit within the luminaire IEC 60598-1 file. IECEE CB report is the practical bridge; rate for 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase. Confirm scope with importer.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for LED drivers in certain ranges under CNCA-C10-01; GB 19510.14-2014 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED driver safety for Mozambique is demonstrated within INNOQ conformity against IEC 61347-2-13 (with IEC 61347-1 general requirements). The standard is largely harmonised with China's GB 19510.14, so the re-testing burden is low, but CCC evidence is not automatically recognised — an IECEE CB report is the practical bridge. Standalone drivers need their own safety evidence; integrated drivers sit within the luminaire IEC 60598-1 file. Rate the driver for the Mozambique 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply (50 Hz matches China; verify the input rating is not configured only for China three-phase 380 V). Portuguese-language markings and an in-country importer apply; there is no Mozambique RoHS overlay on driver components.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克的 LED 驱动器安全在 INNOQ 合规内对照 IEC 61347-2-13（含 IEC 61347-1 通用要求）证明。该标准与中国 GB 19510.14 基本协调，因此重测负担低，但 CCC 证据不自动获认可——IECEE CB 报告是实际桥梁。独立驱动器须具备其自身安全证据；集成驱动器置于灯具 IEC 60598-1 文件内。驱动器须按莫桑比克 220 V / 50 Hz 单相供电额定（50 Hz 与中国一致；核实输入额定非仅按中国三相 380 V 配置）。适用葡萄牙语标识及在地进口商；莫桑比克对驱动器元件无 RoHS 叠加要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克的 LED 驅動器安全在 INNOQ 合規內對照 IEC 61347-2-13（含 IEC 61347-1 通用要求）證明。該標準與中國 GB 19510.14 基本協調，因此重測負擔低，但 CCC 證據不自動獲認可——IECEE CB 報告是實際橋樑。獨立驅動器須具備其自身安全證據；集成驅動器置於燈具 IEC 60598-1 文件內。驅動器須按莫三比克 220 V / 50 Hz 單相供電額定（50 Hz 與中國一致；核實輸入額定非僅按中國三相 380 V 配置）。適用葡萄牙語標識及在地進口商；莫三比克對驅動器元件無 RoHS 疊加要求。
